advancements.locked-in.use_key.title: Under a lock
advancements.locked-in.use_key.desc: Lock or unlock container using a key.
Container that was closed with this enchantment won't be unlockable with lockpick.
enchantment.locked-in.lock_unbreakable.d: Container that was closed with this enchantment won't be breakable.
text.locked-in.key.unbreachable: Seems like the lock doesn't budge
text.locked-in.key.tooltip_0: Shift+RMB to lock and unlock container
text.locked-in.key.tooltip_1: Container can only be opened by the key with the same id
text.locked-in.key.tooltip_3: RMB to try to unlock any container
